faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Mill Basin?
faqs.answer: Mill Basin homes typically deal with carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in this area due to the moisture from nearby water, which can damage wooden structures. Our treatments target all species with customized approaches.
